selection.criteria: first 50 current rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == pending_judge; excludes repair queue, repaired rerun, no-candidate, and already passed rows

blockers: Generic diamond placeholders remain across fairway/current/facility/light-vessel/area rows.
Several service/facility rows use generic or unverified harbor badges instead of exact reference glyphs and color treatment.
Light float/light vessel rows lack vessel or float silhouette and light cues.
Fishing/foul-ground rows confuse buoy or anchor families with the required reference symbols.

verdicts.expected: Mariner's event mark must use the OpenCPN event-mark silhouette, not a generic point diamond.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity: correct symbol class/shape/topmark/color order is not proven. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a generic black diamond with a center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the diamond with the reference mariner-event mark shape and reference-defined color treatment.

verdicts.expected: One-way fairway should be the S-101/OpenCPN single direction arrow/shaft symbol.

verdicts.observed: Helm renders a gray diamond with a center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the diamond with the one-way fairway arrow symbol in the reference orientation/style.
